features.name: assert property in procedural context
features.description: Code should include an assert property statement inside a procedural always block with clocking event
features.snippet:
always @(negedge clk) begin
  assert property (disable iff (!rst_l) ($onehot(grant) |-> !$isunknown(addr)))
  else $error("X or Z");
end

features.name: disable iff in assertion property
features.description: Code should include an assert property with disable iff construct for conditional reset handling

features.name: property sequence with implication operator
features.description: Code should include a property sequence using the |-> implication operator with system functions

features.name: labeled assertion with else clause
features.description: Code should include a labeled assert property statement with else clause for error reporting
features.snippet: assertUnknown : assert property (disable iff (!rst_l) ($onehot(grant) |-> !$isunknown(addr))) else $error("X or Z");
